TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Michael_Arata, title = Michael_Arata, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michael_Arata} }

S.FORM: == Michael Arata == kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Michael Arata, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
== Michael Arata == kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Michael Arata, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == miʦ~ʨħael arata == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, miʦ~ʨħael arata, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
